channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Side-scrolling beat ’em up game The Walking Dead: Streets of Survival announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
New publisher Trailmark Games and The Karate Kid: Street Rumble developer Odaclick Game Studio have announced The Walking Dead: Streets of Survival, a side-scrolling beat ’em game set in the world of AMC’s The Walking Dead. It will be available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam. A release date was not announced. A demo is available now for PC.

Here is an overview of the game, via Trailmark Games:

About

Fight the dead. Survive the streets.

The Walking Dead: Streets of Survival challenges you to intense arcade brawling in the unforgiving world of AMC’s The Walking Dead.

Play as iconic survivors Rick Grimes, Daryl Dixon, and Michonne while fighting through walker-infested tunnels, devastated settlements, and hostile strongholds packed with explosive encounters. Face Alexandria’s most ruthless foes, the Saviors led by Negan, along with overwhelming waves of Walkers as you unleash crushing combos, signature weapon attacks, and devastating finishers in a relentless battle for survival.

Inspired by the Story You Know

Based on the events of the All Out War storyline, fight through a campaign that reimagines the Saviors conflict that features walkers, threats, and surprises pulled from across the world of AMC’s The Walking Dead. You’ll explore familiar environments from the show—including the Sanctuary, Hilltop, Alexandria—enhanced by dynamic set pieces, environmental hazards, and intense, story-driven moments.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Iconic Survivors. Iconic Weapons.

Step into the boots of legendary characters from The Walking Dead, each with a unique fighting style, stats, and signature abilities inspired by the series. Rick’s magnum, Michonne’s katana, and Daryl’s trusty crossbow are all ready for battle.

Key Features

  • Hard-Hitting Arcade Beat ‘Em Up Combat – Use brutal melee abilities, crowd-clearing ranged attacks, or a mix of the two in fast-paced skirmishes. Enjoy responsive, crisp, and satisfying fighting gameplay while exploring the apocalypse.
  • Overwhelming Walker Swarms and Ruthless Enemies – Battle through creeping armies of the undead and dangerous members of The Saviors that force you to adapt, assess threats, and fight for every inch of ground.
  • Face Iconic Bosses – Take on powerful, fan-favorite walkers like Winslow, the Well Walker, and more. The Saviors provide their own challenges as you throw down with Negan and Simon in intense, multi-phase boss battles that test your skill, strategy, and survival instincts.
  • Replayable Arcade Challenge – Master each character’s moveset and tackle multiple difficulty levels in an experience built for repeat runs and escalating challenges. Or jump in with an optional Easy Mode for casual play.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/side-scrolling-beat-em-up-game-the-walking-dead-streets-of-survival-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 3D narrative adventure game Sesame Street: Friends & Fun announced for PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher Outright Games and developer Infinigon have announced Sesame Street: Friends & Fun, a 3D narrative adventure game for up to two players, based on the Sesame Street series. It will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam on October 9.

Here is an overview of the game, via Outright Games:

Sesame Street: Friends & Fun is a brand-new 3D narrative adventure game for up to two players, inspired by the globally beloved children’s series Sesame Street.

In Sesame Street: Friends & Fun, players move into the neighborhood just as preparations begin for a big community celebration. Taking on the role of the newest resident on Sesame Street, players can fully customize their character and join their neighbors in getting everything ready for the party, with the adventure unfolding through interactive storytelling and playful surprises. Along the way, players can expect to befriend the residents, including Elmo, Grover, Bert and Ernie.

Sesame Street: Friends & Fun encourages exploration in safe and welcoming locations inspired by the show. Players can create and customize their own character, personalize their home, and explore the colorful street through light challenges and engaging activities. Mini-games and interactive tasks are woven throughout the story, introducing early math skills and concepts.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Designed specifically for young children, the focus is on a warm, funny, heartfelt story without pressure. Intuitive controls and positive reinforcement make it an accessible first gaming experience for preschoolers. Grown-ups, siblings and friends can also join in the fun with two-player local cooperative play, and parents can feel confident letting children explore independently in a trusted world that has supported families for generations.

Gaming and interactive experiences have been part of the Sesame Street portfolio for more than 40 years, dating back to the release of Sesame Street: Countdown for the Atari 2600 in 1981. Since then, Sesame Street has continued to explore and evolve interactive content across console games, digital apps, and SesameStreet.org. Every interactive experience is designed to strengthen children’s connections to Sesame Street characters and stories in ways that feel personal, playful, and empowering.

Since its debut in 1969, Sesame Street has become one of the most recognizable and trusted brands in children’s media worldwide. Today, Sesame Street reaches more than 300 million households across 190 countries and 30 languages. With 250 Emmy Awards and over five decades of research-backed educational impact, Sesame Street continues to connect children and families globally.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/3d-narrative-adventure-game-sesame-street-friends-fun-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-ps4-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Heave Ho 2 launches July 16
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

PC demo now available.

Party game sequel Heave Ho 2 will launch for Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam on July 16, publisher Devolver Digital and developer Le Cartel announced. A demo is available now for PC.

Here is an overview of the game, via Devolver Digital:

Strap in for slapstick two-to-four-player thrills in cooperative or versus play, as you grab, grapple and swing through eight anarchic themed worlds—from weightless space to kitchen chaos. Lend your friends a helping hand or send them tumbling to their doom. Either way it’s a riot.

For the first time, leap into full online cooperative and versus play with two-to-four people, in addition to the classic couch multiplayer that made the original Heave Ho so beloved. Explore eight all-new worlds brimming with new mechanics and scenarios, and get your hands on an array of gadgets including pop guns, sauce bottles, levers, keys and drones.

With lifetime sales of close to one million copies on PC and Nintendo Switch, the original Heave Ho has earned its stripes as one of Devolver Digital’s all-time bestselling Switch titles.

Heave Ho 2 for Nintendo Switch 2 will also support GameShare, allowing one player with the game to share it locally or online with up to 3 other players. Prepare to laugh and swear at your friends in equal measure when Heave Ho 2 comes out swinging on PC, Nintendo Switch, and Nintendo Switch 2 on July 16.

Watch a new trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/heave-ho-2-launches-july-16
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Atelier Karia: The Night Kingdom & the Guide of Memories first trailer, gameplay, details, and screenshots
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

First look at the newly announced Atelier game.

Publisher Koei Tecmo and developer Gust have released the first official trailer, gameplay, details, and new screenshots for the newly announced Atelier Karia: The Night Kingdom & the Guide of Memories.

Here are the details:

In Atelier Karia: The Night Kingdom & the Guide of Memories, players will return to the continent of Aladiss, first introduced in Atelier Yumia: The Alchemist of Memories & the Envisioned Land. This new chapter follows amnesiac alchemist Karia on a profound quest centered on discovery and growth. Working together with Servio Lektor, a heretic biologist from the pioneering team, and Fina Rozen, a talented fighter, Karia sets out on a journey to explore Aladiss’ mysterious underworld to uncover its secret. Guided by alchemist Yumia Liessfeldt, Karia will develop her talent for alchemy whilst seeking to recover her lost memories, to reawaken the past and savor the present.

As depicted in all Atelier titles, alchemy and synthesis will remain at the absolute heart of the gameplay experience, deepening players’ experience and allowing them to use synthesized items for more than just combat. Using the alchemy cauldron found in the depth of Aladdiss’ underworld, players will be able to create unique items thanks to a deep synthesis system that blends strategy and creativity. By connecting the mana pieces of the different ingredients selected, players can change the effects of the item synthesized, resulting in an infinite number of possible variations and combinations.

Fans can anticipate an entirely fresh take on the franchise, however, with Karia’s signature mechanic: a unique system that blends traditional alchemy with culinary exploration. While foraging, players can snack on gathered ingredients to trigger immediate, dynamic effects, such as sprouting animal ears and gaining specialized traits when consuming animal-based components.

  • ❮
  • ❯

The combat mechanics introduced in Atelier Yumia have also been meticulously refined to offer an advanced hybrid battle system. The updated mechanics seamlessly blend high-octane action with strategic command menus. Players must test their reflexes by parrying enemy attacks in real time, while retaining complete tactical control over the flow of battle by pausing time, allowing them to select the skills and items to use via the command menu.

The power of alchemy extends far beyond the battlefield as synthesized items can now be used during exploration to allow players to reach new locations or find hidden treasures. Depending on the items used, they will be able to solve challenges and even gather different ingredients. Furthermore, it will be possible to use synthesized items while building to improve the efficiency of their bases.

Atelier Karia: The Night Kingdom & the Guide of Memories is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam in early 2027.

Watch the trailer below. View the screenshots at the gallery.

First Trailer

English

Japanese

First Look

English

Announcement Special Program

Japanese

(Gameplay starts at 45:46.)



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/atelier-karia-the-night-kingdom-the-guide-of-memories-first-trailer-gameplay-details-and-screenshots
